include_reason: Primary live-demo document: one scanned page, all nine header fields, six repeated line items, and complete line-item amounts.
Fast smoke test with one page, one line item, and a complete amount reconciliation.
Compact one-page form with all nine header fields and four complete line items.
Rotated multi-page layout with all nine header fields and 21 line items; tests native visual understanding.
Dense three-page table with 31 line items and a complete amount reconciliation.
Invoice contains both Invoice # and Order # plus a Net Total but no explicit Gross Amount; tests the partner identifier precedence and gross-vs-net field contract.
Advertising request sheet rather than an invoice; only agency is labeled, making it a strong hallucination and routing trap.
Credit memo with a negative gross amount and no line items; tests parentheses-style money parsing.
Zero gross amount alongside non-zero line-item amounts; demonstrates why arithmetic consistency is advisory, not a hard accuracy rule.
All nine header fields are present, but the single annotated line amount does not equal gross; another legitimate arithmetic anomaly.
Eight-page scan with 37 line items and malformed OCR in the labeled gross amount; tests parser and label-quality handling.
Ten-page form with all nine header fields, 64 line items, and partial line-item amounts; bounded stress test for latency and output completeness.
